payload.answer: mem_new was returned because it is the latest active memory matching the Sam-from-Goldman context. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded, so Brain correctly avoided showing an outdated fact as current. This is expected behavior when an older memory has been replaced by a newer one.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching Sam and Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall context identifies Sam with Goldman; no new entity resolution or durable memory commit is needed for this debug explanation.

payload.intent: Explain recall behavior for the query/context involving Sam from Goldman.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new is the active memory selected for Sam associated with Goldman.
mem_old was not returned as a current result because it is marked as superseded by newer memory.

details: Did not present the superseded memory as current.

repair_options: If mem_old should still be visible for audit purposes, inspect it in history/debug mode rather than normal recall.
If mem_new is incorrect, update or supersede mem_new with a corrected memory.
If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, repair the supersession metadata linking mem_old to mem_new.

This is expected behavior when an older memory has been replaced by a newer one.","citations":["mem_new","mem_old"],"repair_options":["If mem_old should still be visible for audit purposes, inspect it in history/debug mode rather than normal recall.","If mem_new is incorrect, update or supersede mem_new with a corrected memory.","If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, repair the supersession metadata linking mem_old to mem_new."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Explained why mem_new was returned.","Explained why mem_old was filtered.","Did not present the superseded memory as current.","No durable memory was committed."]}}
